name: NET_WORTH
title: Net Worth Projection App
description: Financial simulation platform modeling multi-decade retirement outcomes — portfolio growth, cash flow, and withdrawal sustainability for dual-income households.
highlights: Allocation-based return modeling with failure-year detection

name: AUDIO_MXR
title: DIY Digital Audio Mixer
description: UCF Capstone. Four 4-layer PCBs (Power Supply, STM32 MCU, Analog Signal, Digital Signal). DSP on RPi5. SNR 50 dB, <10 ms latency, 8-channel real-time processing, AI automixing.
highlights: Four separate compact 4-layer PCBs accommodating full mixed-signal chain
Phantom power capability; STM32 MCU and analog/digital signal boards
AI automixing feature via webapp control interface

name: RIR_ML
title: Room Impulse Response ML
description: ML pipeline for estimating and reconstructing Room Impulse Responses from acoustic measurements. Baseline WaveUNet model with modular DSP architecture and ablation testing.
highlights: End-to-end RIR estimation from raw microphone recordings
WaveUNet baseline with modular, swappable DSP architecture
ISO 3382 compliant RT60 / clarity metrics evaluation

name: ACST_LENS
title: AcousticLens WebDSP
description: Real-time, zero-dependency browser DSP toolchain. Implements STFT acoustic fingerprinting and interactive FIR filter design via IFFT, adhering to ISO 226:2023 and IEEE Std 1241.
highlights: Zero-dependency: pure JavaScript, no external libraries
STFT acoustic fingerprinting with configurable window parameters
Interactive FIR filter design via Inverse FFT

name: QPSK_SIM
title: QPSK Baseband Transceiver Sim
description: End-to-end QPSK digital comm link simulation. RRC pulse shaping, AWGN channel model, matched filter reception, empirical BER vs. theoretical limits per ETSI EN 302 307.
highlights: Root-Raised Cosine (RRC) pulse shaping with configurable roll-off
AWGN channel model across full Eb/N0 sweep
Matched filter reception with BER-vs-theory comparison
